heading: Access Transparency Employee Identifiers
body:
You can monitor certain actions on your infrastructure with an
anonymized **Employee Identifier**, which you can view in each
[Project Activity Feed](view-activity-feed) entry related to accessing
your infrastructure.

Each **Employee Identifier**:

- Starts with `mongodb-employee` and ends with a few digits.

- Is unique for each organization and MongoDB employee.

- Lasts for 30 days before Atlas automatically replaces it with a new identifier.

- Consists of a unique value that Atlas does not reuse for at least
  365 days from the day Atlas creates it.

> **Note:** If you have questions about employee access to your cluster
> infrastructure or logs, contact MongoDB Support.
